name: Apollo Micro Systems Limited
summary: Apollo Micro Systems Limited designs, develops, assembles, and tests electronic and electro-mechanical solutions in India. The company offers DSP products, missile hardware simulators, integrated avionics modules, generic PCM encoders and decoders, DSSS de-modulators, seeker electronics, RPF and signal processing systems, turret control and power units, missile interface units, launcher controllers, launcher interface units, tiger sharc DSP-signal processors, quad actuator controllers, fault tolerant and system relay boxes, and DSP controllers. It also provides ground defense products, including ESM-eagle kit, embedded arss, PSU, and auxiliary controllers; and integrated payload checkout systems, satellite data simulators, high speed frame synchronizers, time code readers/generators, bit synchronizers, monopulse tracking receivers, PCIE-HSDR systems, PCM-two channel decommutators, PCIe based two channel data acquisition cards, and PCI-X based two channel serial data acquisition cards. In addition, the company offers transportation products, such as GPA based integrated mine management systems, weight-in-motion systems, tire care products, passenger information systems, and station announcement systems; embedded solutions, including Ethernet, base band modules, converters, USB/Ethernet protocol converters, dual data bus couplers, and data bus solutions; and home land security products comprising solar street lighting, CCTV surveillance, vehicle tracking, boom barrier, RFID fleet management, UAV detecting and jamming, GSM interception, Wi-Fi interception, lawful interception, and portable x-ray inspection systems, as well as passenger information displays, wall radar, and reactive convoy and stationary, and portable and stationary bomb jammers. Further, it provides electronic manufacturing, hardware design, IT and software, and electronic design and mechanical engineering CAD services. Apollo Micro systems Limited was founded in 1985 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
